name: Util.Texts.Tokenizers

documentation.description: Iterate over the tokens of the Content input. Each token is separated by a pattern represented by Pattern. For each token, call the procedure Process with the token. When Going is Backward, scan the input from the end. Stop iterating over the tokens when the Process procedure returns True in Done.

subprograms.name: Iterate_Tokens

formals.name: Index
Input
formals.code: type Input is array (Positive range <>) of Char;
